paragraphs.text: Good evening. I reach to you on the behalf of the gamer community to discuss the issue about video game companies killing games and making them unaccesible to the public. Wether it's and online only game or an offline game, there's a big issue where these companies are killing those games and making them impossible to play in the present and the future. We should all be able to enjoy that kind of media, like we enjoy books and movies that date more than a century ago. We would like you to revise and asses the situation that we, the gamers, are living in this day and age, and we implore you that these companies stop killing our games. I haven't been victim of this inexcusable practice yet, but i assure you that, if this continues, it will happen, and we will lose tons of media because of the greed of videogame companies. Thank you for your time and patience, we count on your aid with this endeavor.
